description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Tuesday, June 10, 2025 a Nuro vehicle operating in autonomous mode encountered a trash can some distance from the curb. When 
passing the trash can, the side mirror tapped the trash can. The trash can was not damaged or moved. The Nuro vehicle sustained negligible 
damage to a plastic attachment on the side mirror.
Print
Clear Form
